zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Marjory Done於1410年出生在英國爾武特金頓時，她的父親Done20歲，母親Done20歲。她於1432年與Hugh Calveley在英國爾米德列維其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1509年在英國英格蘭爾達頓享年99歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾易格特費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Done
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Alfredo, Angel, Berto, Cristobal, Dinora, Eloisa, Francisco, Generoso, Gustavo, Juan.
English: variant of Donne, itself a variant of Dunn .

variants.name: Dunn
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinn, Ó Doinn ‘descendant of Donn’, a byname meaning ‘brown-haired’ or ‘chieftain’. Compare Dunne . This name has sometimes been Anglicized as Brown .
English: nickname for a dark complexioned or swarthy man, from Middle English dun ‘dun, dark’ (Old English dunn ‘dull brown’).
Scottish: habitational name from Dun in Angus, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’. Compare Dun .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Marjory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Marjory Done was born in 1410, in Utkinton, Cheshire, England, her father, Done, was 20 and her mother, Done, was 20. She married Hugh Calveley in 1432, in Middlewich, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1509, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 99, and was buried in Ightfield, Shropshire, England.

fr.Lea, Cheshire, England: Lea by Backford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Marjory Done est née en 1410, à Utkinton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Done, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Done, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Calveley en 1432, à Middlewich, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1509, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 99 ans, et a été enterrée à Ightfield, Shropshire, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1432 in Middlewich, Cheshire, England Hugh Calveley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1509 im Alter von 99 Jahren in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ightfield, Shropshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Marjory Doneが1410年にイギリスチェシュアイアウトキントンで生まれた時，父Doneは20歳，母Doneは20歳であった。1432年にイギリスチェシュアイアミッドルイチでHugh Calveleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1509年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで99歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアイトフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Lea, Cheshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 리아 비 바ck퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Marjory Done(이)가 1410년 영국 체실르 우트킨턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Done(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Done(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1432년 영국 체실르 미들루이치에서 Hugh Calveley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1509년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 99세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 이트필드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Hugh Calveley em 1432, em Middlewich, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Lea, Cheshire, England: леа би баккфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Marjory Done родилась в 1410 г. в местности уткинтон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Done было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Done, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Calveley в 1432 г. в местности миддльвич, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1509 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 99 лет и была похоронена в местности аитфиелд, шропшир, Англия.
